_meta.source: All values transcribed from baseline_3 (front + back). The error-label CONTROL fixtures are the same product.
_meta.note: Top-level keys are the COMPLETE set of mandatory label items for wine. verify() consumes brand_name, class_type, alcohol_content, net_contents, name_and_address, country_of_origin; appellation/vintage are rule-checked by verify() FROM THE LABEL (not matched to this form). See _checklist.

name_and_address: Produced and Bottled By Lighthouse Vintners, Kingston, NY
health_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

brand_name.verifier_checks: partial (fuzzy vs brand/fanciful union; brand 'Lighthouse' vs fanciful 'Stormchaser White' vs varietal read is unstable)

fanciful_name.applies: conditional/optional - NOT mandatory for wine; may appear on any label and does NOT satisfy the required class/type designation. Present here ('Stormchaser White').
fanciful_name.verifier_checks: no (now a DEDICATED evidence-only extraction field 'fanciful_name', useful for COLA matching; NOT consumed by verify() -> reviewer-only / not verifier-judged)

class_type.applies: yes - universally required; the grape varietal 'Chardonnay' IS the class/type designation (a fanciful name alone does not satisfy it)
class_type.verifier_checks: partial (fuzzy; not matched to a Grape Varietal field nor the 4.91 approved-for-domestic list)

appellation.verifier_checks: yes (presence required when triggered; checked FROM THE LABEL by _check_appellation, not matched to this form)

vintage.verifier_checks: trigger-only (used to require an appellation; not independently matched to this form)

alcohol_content.applies: conditional (<=14% table wine may state 'table wine' in lieu of a numeric ABV; this one states the ABV)
alcohol_content.verifier_checks: yes (numeric match + NOTATION now checked; <=14% table/light-wine omission handled by _is_low_alcohol_table_wine)

net_contents.verifier_checks: partial (unit-aware VOLUME compare; standard-of-fill table 4.72 NOT enforced)

name_and_address.verifier_checks: partial (punctuation/relationship-prefix-normalized fuzzy + coverage guard; no-intervening-text not checked)

sulfite_declaration.applies: conditional - PRESENT on this label ('Contains Sulfites'); required at >=10ppm SO2
sulfite_declaration.verifier_checks: no (now a DEDICATED evidence-only extraction field 'sulfite_declaration'; presence not asserted; trigger not observable -> reviewer-only / not verifier-judged)

health_warning.verifier_checks: yes (exact wording + ALL-CAPS + S/G deterministic; BOLD confidence-gated and unstable; the all-caps warning body is compliant)

_layout_typography_structural.designation_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR 4.21 / 4.34 - class/type designation separate and apart from other info -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.name_address_bottler_phrase: 27 CFR 4.35 - name/address must immediately follow 'Bottled By'/'Imported By' with no intervening text -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR part 16 - warning separate and apart, one statement -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_bold_typography: 27 CFR part 16 - 'GOVERNMENT WARNING' CAPS + BOLD and S/G capitalization; caps + S/G deterministic, BOLD confidence-gated and machine-unreliable -> reviewer-leaning

_not_applicable.percentage_of_foreign_wine: n/a (not a blend referring to foreign wine; 27 CFR 4.32(a)(4))
_not_applicable.formula_number: n/a (standard varietal wine; formula generally not required)
